spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1187 ZORO AND SOMMERS' FULL INTERACTION IN THE CHAPTER: Zoro arrives at Sommers' location by the port, where the recovered ship that will transport the children kidnapped by Killingham is doc
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1187 ZORO AND SOMMERS' FULL INTERACTION IN THE CHAPTER: Zoro arrives at Sommers' location by the port, where the recovered ship that will transport the children kidnapped by Killingham is docked. Zoro: What are you doing here... one of the "Three Devils"...? Sommers: One of the Straw Hats?! You were in the village earlier! What do you want? You're gonna get hurt! Zoro: You're the ones who crashed our reunion feast with our old friends... Sommers: Oh, don't worry about us!! Its just ten or twenty brats...!! One of my colleagues will be bringing them here soon!! Once that happens, it's all over. Sorry for the interruption! Zoro: What a coincidence... One of our crew just so happens to be heading to the village too... Though I don't think your colleague's coming back... Sommers: Oh? And why's that? Zoro: Because that guy's gonna drop dead*!!! *Sommers attacks Zoro with his thorn sword* Sommers: GIHAHAHA!! You really have no idea just how invincible we are right now!!! [Zoro says "kutabaru" (くたばる) in Japanese, a colloquial verb meaning "to die" or "to drop dead." It appears that Zoro believes Sanji is going to KILL Killingham. 👀🔥🔥🔥]

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1187 Find me a friend who is loyal, has faith and respect as Zoro has for Sanji. Both truly trust each other, to a point where Zoro legit says to Sommers that Kilingham never will bwat Sanji.
